channel.title: suryaavala.com — Notes
channel.description: Long-form essays on MLOps, GenAI architecture, causal inference, and platform engineering.

item.title: Causal Inference Over Deep Learning
item.description: When propensity matching and do-calculus beat a transformer — a FinOps lens on a 40% cost reduction at Amber Electric.

item.title: First Principles Multi-Agent Orchestration
item.description: Why scaling-succotash is a distributed system first and an LLM stack second — Celery DLQs, circuit breakers, and the Kubernetes substrate that holds the whole thing up.

item.title: Hidden Technical Debt in Machine Learning
item.description: Why elegant theoretical data science requires massive infrastructure to scale safely — lessons from the Montu GCP ML Platform.
